name: Amherst
description_short: Amherst Federal Credit Union is a member-owned, NCUA-insured credit union serving the Amherst, NY community since 1947, offering competitive lending and deposit products.
description_long:
Amherst Federal Credit Union was established in 1947 as Amherst Teacher's Federal Credit Union by educators, initially serving 46 sponsor groups and their families. In 2003, the credit union expanded its membership base by adding non-education-based sponsor groups and rebranded as Amherst Federal Credit Union. Today, it remains a fully member-owned, not-for-profit financial institution headquartered at 6470 Main Street in Amherst, New York, with federal insurance protection through the National Credit Union Administration (NCUA).

Amherst FCU offers a comprehensive range of banking services designed to serve diverse community needs. Their product suite includes home equity lines of credit (as low as 5.75% APR), various loan options with competitive rates, share accounts, mobile banking, ATM access to surcharge-free networks, and online banking services. They actively promote financial literacy and offer member discounts on estate planning through Trust & Will partnerships. The credit union also features loan coupons tied to member reviews and provides educational credit union resources.

What distinguishes Amherst FCU is its deeply rooted community presence spanning over 75 years and its member-ownership structure that prioritizes personalized service. The institution emphasizes tailored financial planning for diverse member profiles—from college students to small business owners to first-time homebuyers. They demonstrate commitment to financial education through Financial Literacy Month initiatives and maintain strong community engagement through volunteer programs and local events.

Amherst FCU's primary limitation is its geographic concentration in the Amherst, NY area, which may restrict accessibility for non-local members despite online banking capabilities. The website provides limited transparency regarding membership eligibility requirements, specific loan terms, deposit rates, and fee structures. Members seeking comprehensive product disclosures or detailed rate comparisons may need to contact the institution directly at (716) 634-3881.
pros: Home equity lines of credit available at 5.75% APR—competitive rate prominently advertised
Member-owned, not-for-profit structure means earnings returned as higher dividends and lower loan rates
NCUA federal insurance protects member deposits with full faith and credit backing
Surcharge-free ATM network access for members
Mobile banking app enables banking on-the-go
Loan discount program: lower rates available through member reviews (Loan Coupons)
Trust & Will discounted estate planning services exclusive to members
cons: Limited geographic footprint (Amherst, NY area) may restrict in-person service accessibility
Website does not clearly disclose membership eligibility criteria or sponsor group requirements
Limited transparency on deposit rates, savings account types, CDs, or fee schedules
Minimal information about business loan products or SBA loan availability
No details provided on credit card offerings or other consumer credit products
best_for: Educators and employees of sponsor organizations seeking personalized member-owned banking
Amherst, NY-area residents needing home equity financing and competitive loan rates
First-time homebuyers and small business owners requiring flexible lending solutions
diagnosis: Amherst FCU is best suited for Amherst, NY-area residents and employees of designated sponsor organizations seeking traditional credit union banking with personalized service and competitive rates. The main caveat is that membership eligibility appears restricted to sponsor group employees and their families, and geographic access to physical branch services is limited to the single Amherst location.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_title: Amherst — Credit Union in AMHERST, NY | CreditDoc
meta_description: Amherst — NCUA-insured credit union in AMHERST, NY. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
